name: React Dojo
description: Master the art of component-based UI. From useState to useEffect, learn to build fast, reactive, and reusable interfaces the React way.

name: JavaScript Dojo
tagline: The language of the web, mastered.
description: From closures to async/await — sharpen your core JavaScript skills and understand how the language truly works under the hood.

name: CSS Dojo
description: Flexbox, Grid, animations, and design systems. Stop guessing and start building layouts with precision and confidence.

name: Node.js Dojo
description: Learn to build REST APIs, handle authentication, and connect to databases. Your first step into the world of backend development.
